meta.location: Hong Kong SAR (candidate) / Role TBD (US-based; ServiceNow has APAC presence)

overallMatch.summary: Max has deep enterprise SaaS and presales leadership experience at Workday and Oracle, with strong domain expertise in HCM and workforce solutions that align well with Moveworks' AI platform for workforce productivity. However, the Solution Sales Executive role is fundamentally a quota-carrying, deal-closing position, whereas Max's background is presales/solution consulting. His profile is an excellent fit for Advisory Solution Consultant or Director Solution Consulting roles; for Solution Sales Executive, he would need to demonstrate or pivot toward direct sales and quota ownership.

granularScores.rationale: Strong enterprise SaaS, HCM, CRM, and presales skills; value selling methodology (MEDDPIC, Challenger) not explicitly cited; Salesforce and forecasting experience unclear. Skills are presales-heavy vs. AE closing focus.
21 years in enterprise software; 18+ in presales/sales consulting at Oracle and Workday. Domain and tenure align, but role type differs—presales leadership vs. quota-carrying sales.
PMP® credential; no degree explicitly listed on LinkedIn. Role typically expects bachelor's; PMP adds credibility for complex deal execution.
Hong Kong-based; Moveworks/ServiceNow has APAC presence. Role requires 30–50% travel. Geographic fit plausible for APAC-focused role; US-based role would be a stretch.
Strong career evolution: programmer → PM → consultant → presales → Head of Presales. Cross-domain (ERP, HCM, PLM, VCP, retail). Demonstrated learning agility.
Moveworks post-acquisition offers growth. Presales-to-sales pivot is possible but represents a role shift. Clear path if he targets Solution Consulting vs. Sales.
Workday/Oracle presales leadership typically commands strong compensation. No explicit data; assumed within range with some uncertainty.

jobRequirements.evidence: 18+ years presales/sales consulting; Oracle and Workday; complex deals but presales-influenced vs. direct quota ownership
Deals exceeding $5M+ combined contract value; no explicit quota metrics in profile
Solution Selling, consultative selling; methodology not explicitly cited
C-level engagement in retail, EMS, high-tech, F&B; Go-to-Market strategy development
Workday HCM Cloud, Oracle HCM Cloud; AI agents, n8n, Flowise; enterprise cloud sales
Deep HCM, ERP, workforce solutions; Moveworks targets similar buyer personas (HR, IT, employee experience)

strengths: Enterprise SaaS pedigree: 10+ years at Oracle and Workday—both Fortune 500 vendors with complex, high-value deals.
HCM and workforce domain: Deep expertise in HCM, ERP, and workforce solutions; directly relevant to Moveworks' AI Assistant for workforce productivity.
Presales leadership: Head of Presales Greater China at Workday; proven ability to scale teams and drive technical discovery, demos, and POCs.
C-level engagement: Experience providing insights to C-level in retail, EMS, high-tech, and F&B; Go-to-Market strategy development.
PMP certification: Strong project and program management discipline for complex, multi-stakeholder deals.
ServiceNow ecosystem awareness: Moveworks acquired by ServiceNow (Dec 2025); Workday and ServiceNow operate in adjacent enterprise software spaces.

gaps.recommendation: Solution Sales Executive is quota-carrying; Max's background is presales. If targeting this role, highlight any deal-closing, pipeline ownership, or quota experience. Otherwise, consider Advisory Solution Consultant or Director Solution Consulting roles at Moveworks/ServiceNow.
Add MEDDPIC, Challenger, or Force Management training/experience to resume and LinkedIn. Prepare stories that demonstrate value selling and business case development.

gaps.gap: Deal size and quota metrics missing
gaps.recommendation: Quantify: deal sizes closed or influenced, pipeline generated, quota attainment, and annual contract values. Even presales-influenced metrics strengthen the narrative.
Explicitly list Salesforce and forecasting tools used; these are standard requirements for the role.
Confirm whether the role is US-based or APAC. If US-based, address relocation or remote-work expectations.

interviewPrepFocus: Role clarity: Be ready to explain why you're moving from presales leadership to Solution Sales Executive (quota-carrying). Frame presales as a foundation for sales.
Moveworks + ServiceNow: Understand the acquisition rationale, product integration roadmap, and how Moveworks fits into ServiceNow's AI strategy. Reference the $2.85B deal and ~250 mutual customers.
Value selling and C-level relationships: Prepare 2–3 stories of complex deals where you developed business cases for unbudgeted spend and engaged C-level stakeholders.
Metrics: Prepare specific numbers: deal sizes, pipeline, quota attainment, and ACV—even if presales-influenced.
actionableRecommendations: Verify role fit: Confirm whether you want a quota-carrying sales role (Solution Sales Executive) or a presales/consulting role (Advisory Solution Consultant, Director Solution Consulting). Your profile is stronger for the latter.
Update resume and LinkedIn: Add value selling methodology, Salesforce, deal metrics, and quota/ACV where applicable.
Leverage Workday–ServiceNow adjacency: Emphasize enterprise HCM and workforce domain; Moveworks targets similar buyer personas (HR, IT, employee experience).
Network: Connect with Moveworks/ServiceNow employees in APAC, especially post-acquisition; understand team structure and hiring priorities.
Prepare for role-type questions: Expect 'Why sales vs. presales?' and 'What's your quota experience?'—have clear, evidence-based answers.

highlights.executiveSummary: Moveworks is an enterprise AI company providing an AI Assistant platform for workforce productivity—context-aware search and end-to-end task automation. Founded 2016; acquired by ServiceNow for $2.85B (Dec 2025). Serves 350+ enterprises, 5M+ employees, 10% of Fortune 500.
highlights.leadership: Bhavin Shah (CEO), Varun Singh (President), Jiang Chen (CTO AI), Vaibhav Nivargi (CTO). 82% CEO approval on Glassdoor.
highlights.products: AI Assistant, Enterprise Search, Agent Studio, Reasoning Engine, AI Agent Marketplace, Service Management. Strong ServiceNow integration.
highlights.culture: 7 values: Excellence, Ownership, Action, Execution, Transparency, Growth mindset, Speed. Glassdoor 3.8–4.1/5.
highlights.recommendation: Good — Strong opportunity for experienced enterprise sales professional. Post-acquisition uncertainty to clarify in interviews. Product-market fit, ServiceNow integration, and culture are positives.
